column1: # `pull_request` smoke. It mirrors the canonical InvoiceKit ISO 4217
# smoke can verify the runner is idempotent against a known input
# without depending on a live upstream fetch.
# This file is NOT the upstream of record — that remains the SIX Group
# publication URL listed in `sources::BUILTIN_SOURCES`. The nightly
# `schedule:` trigger fetches that upstream and normalizes it; the
# smoke uses this fixture for hermetic CI.
